'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=R2JB7aXMil9j0iv3DHyv_oF9NCO.bWev9KVsolC2gD4-1770125054-1.0.1.1-2U7SZdA8t6h.gYKvV7mSzVFP0x63_99meFnKKzqBt3c"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
